subcodes.first_line: O Muhammad! The fire in all trees proclaimeth "The Chosen One hath come!", and the light from the horizon of Sinai shineth forth with radiance [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای محمد نار در جمیع اشجار بقد اتی المختار ناطق و نور از افق طور بضیاء
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @Manifestation of God as sun
